productDisplayName: Nike Men Free Run+ 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: If it's unending speed you're looking for, there's no better running shoe than the nike Free Run+ 2. With perforations that allows water to drain away, keeping your feet dry and comfortable even in wet weather, this shoe is designed to maximise the foot's natural range of motion and provide protection and cushioning for a smooth ride.UpperMesh and bonded synthetic overlays for durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded mesh tongue and collarMidsolePU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grroves for easy movementShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
